# Colophon {-}

```{r colophon-info, echo=FALSE}
cat("Built with:\n")
cat("  bookdown: ", as.character(packageVersion("bookdown")), "\n", sep = "")
cat("  R:        ", R.version.string, "\n", sep = "")
cat("  Build date: ", as.character(Sys.Date()), "\n", sep = "")
commit <- tryCatch(
  system("git rev-parse --short HEAD", intern = TRUE),
  error   = function(e) "unknown",
  warning = function(w) "unknown"
)
cat("  Commit:   ", commit, "\n", sep = "")
```

## Session info {-}

```{r session-info, echo=FALSE}
if (requireNamespace("sessioninfo", quietly = TRUE)) {
  print(sessioninfo::session_info(pkgs = "attached"))
} else {
  print(sessionInfo())
}
```
